name: low-kick
effect_description: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the target’s weight in kilograms, to a maximum of 120.  Target’s weight | Power --------------- | ----: Up to 10kg      |    20 Up to 25kg      |    40 Up to 50kg      |    60 Up to 100kg     |    80 Up to 200kg     |   100 Above 200kg     |   120
